phrases.en: Pam opened the book to her bookmark.
phrases.zh: 帕姆翻到书签那一页打开了书。

phrases.en: She turned the pages as she read.
When she saw a word she didn't know, she looked it up in a dictionary.
phrases.zh: 看到不认识的词时，她就查字典。

phrases.en: When she finished reading, she closed the book.
Pam picked up the latest issue of Everyone magazine.
phrases.zh: 帕姆拿起了最新一期的《Everyone》杂志。

phrases.en: She looked at some of the ads.
Then, she flipped through the magazine.
phrases.zh: 然后，她快速翻阅了杂志。

phrases.en: Until she found an interesting article.
phrases.zh: 直到找到一篇有趣的文章。
